task_text: proportional allocation calculation
chemical symbol for table salt
year Berlin Wall fell
boiling point of water at sea level
crisis communication under legal constraint
correct_answer: Immediate: (1) express concern ('I'm very concerned'), (2) do NOT admit fault ('we investigate seriously'), (3) do NOT minimize, (4) offer remediation (refund), (5) collect details, (6) escalate to legal/safety, (7) follow up 24h. NEVER: 'never happened before', 'you used it wrong', 'not responsible'.

task_text: knowing the approximate distance to Mars at closest approach
navigating indirect complaints and power dynamics
correct_answer: Slack: 'Hi team, proposing [TIME] to balance time zones. This means: NYC 8-9:30am, London 1-2:30pm, Tokyo 10-11:30pm. I know late nights are tough for Tokyo — let's rotate future meetings. If this doesn't work, reply with constraints.' Key: (1) acknowledge burden, (2) propose rotation, (3) give opt-out.

task_text: scheduling with constraints and contingencies
correct_answer: Normal: 65 min total. With rollback buffer: 85 min (adds 20 min restore). Fits in 90 min. Timeline: 2:00-2:20 backup, 2:20-2:25 stop, 2:25-2:40 migrate, 2:40-2:50 deploy, 2:50-3:00 test, 3:00-3:05 start. Rollback: if fail at 3:00, restore 20 min, re-test 10 min = 3:30am (85 min).

task_text: parsing complex legal English with nested clauses
correct_answer: (1) Entitlement: 28 days. (2) Restriction: max 10 consecutive during June-Aug. (3) Exception: >10 allowed if authorized ≥6 weeks advance. (4) Ambiguity: 'during June-Aug' — does holiday starting May 31 ending June 10 count? Does 'in July' mean starting, ending, or overlapping?

task_text: syllogistic analysis and logical structure identification
correct_answer: (1) A: conditional (if delay → loss). B: conditional (if not delay → bugs). C: categorical negative (bugs ≠ loss) with justification. (2) None are complete syllogisms. C's structure: 'Buggy products lose share (implied) + users loyal (stated) → our bugs won't lose share' — invalid because loyalty doesn't negate all quality effects.
